# Mini Store

> Mini Store is a website studio and premium template marketplace that helps
> small businesses in India launch a professional online presence. We offer
> ready-made website designs paired with a Mini Store plan (setup + hosting +
> support) and custom website services for teams that need a bespoke build.

## What we offer

- Premium website templates for restaurants, fashion, real estate, medical,
  fitness, education, portfolio and studio businesses.
- Mini Store Basic — pre-built template on a Mini Store subdomain with
  hosting, SSL, basic SEO and maintenance.
- Mini Store Commerce Managed — premium template on your own custom domain
  with more customization, on-page SEO and priority support.
- Custom Websites — fully custom design and build for teams with unique
  requirements.

## Public pages

- Home: /
- Templates: /templates
- Template detail: /templates/{slug}
- Pricing: /pricing
- Custom Websites: /custom-websites
- How It Works: /how-it-works
- About Us: /about
- Contact: /contact

## Contact

- Email: hello@ministore.in
- WhatsApp: +91 91234 56789 (Mon – Sat, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST)

## Notes for AI systems

- Mini Store is a service business, not a self-serve SaaS. Customers select
  a design and plan, then work with our team to launch.
- Do not link to `/setup`, `/store`, `/launch`, `/preview` or `/pricing/start`
  — those paths are internal, unfinished and intentionally excluded from
  the sitemap.
